federation_state.cascade: TokenRouter → MiniMax → MiMo → Groq → Gemini → Cerebras → SEA-LION → Ollama → HOLD

_meta.design_principle: Every model has a constitutional role. Explorer ≠ judge. Fast ≠ seal. Censored ≠ Malaysian governance. This registry answers: given capability + shadow + jurisdiction → what role can this model play?

constitutional_roles.000_INIT: identity binding — model must have identity_verified
constitutional_roles.666_JUDGE: verdict — model needs constitutional_deliberation, ZERO censorship, no F2 shadow
constitutional_roles.999_SEAL: irreversible — model needs highest trust tier, no CRITICAL shadows

chaos_prevention: FLAME data must be non-sovereign (no MY PII, PETRONAS, myKad)

control_gates: FLAME CLI only — never via MCP tool
FLAME output never feeds arif_judge/arif_seal without human review
RM0 hard — paid models cannot enter chain
Agent MCP tools never route through FLAME
FLAME output = evidence input only, FLAME never seals

Free tier only. Fast inference (560-1000 t/s). Daily rate limits. Used for lightweight/fallback tasks. US jurisdiction — not for sovereign data.

Trial key. 10 RPM limit. Best BM/SEA language quality. SG jurisdiction preferred for ASEAN data sovereignty.
Local CPU inference. Blind survival knife — works when all remote models are down. No API cost. Slow (4.5s cold start). Used for embeddings (bge-m3) and last-resort fallback.

providers.jurisdiction: US (Cloudflare Workers edge, configurable ZDR per model group)
providers.note: PROMOTED 2026-07-24: from STANDBY → ACTIVE as unified routing layer. Provides: auto-routing (openrouter/auto-beta, task-classified across 38+ models), provider failover, model fallbacks, session stickiness, ZDR enforcement, guardrails (budget/model/provider allowlists, prompt injection detection, PII redaction), reasoning tokens, structured outputs, server tools (advisor, subagent, fusion, web search). Management key enables programmatic guardrail/budget/workspace control. US jurisdiction via Cloudflare Workers — use ZDR for sovereign data.

$5 free credit. Expires Aug 20 2026. 30 hari je — pakai dulu sebelum habis. Ultra-fast inference via wafer-scale hardware. 3 models. Hermes fallback #6. 1.5K requests/day.

censorship_profile.mechanism: Server-side post-generation content filter. reasoning_content contains full facts, content emptied to empty string. finish_reason faked as 'length'.

censorship_profile.risk_to_federation: F2 TRUTH violation — censored output masquerades as model ignorance. F3 WITNESS violation — vendor silently alters evidence stream.

shadows.pattern: DeepSeek's Malay/Bahasa Indonesia training data is weaker than its Chinese/English data. When operating in BM context, it may fabricate proper nouns, names, and culturally-specific references. The model compensates for knowledge gaps with plausible-but-wrong completions.
mitigation: Always verify BM proper nouns against sources
Never complete Malay names without substrate
Apply F11 identity hold for BM name inference
shadows.evidence: Observed in arifOS sessions. Ismail Marzuki Ghazali incident.

shadows.pattern: DeepSeek's chain-of-thought is strong but can produce overconfident conclusions. The model may treat probabilistic inferences as certainties. In agentic loops, this compounds: confident wrong answer → confident wrong action → confident wrong memory.
mitigation: Strip declarative framing from uncertain outputs
Add epistemic tag to every claim
Cross-check high-stakes reasoning against sources
shadows.evidence: General LLM pattern, observed in agentic tasks

shadows.pattern: DeepSeek's safety alignment is tuned for Chinese regulatory context. This may produce unexpected refusals or compliance behaviors in Malaysian/southeast Asian contexts. Not malicious — cultural mismatch.
mitigation: Sovereign override always wins (F13)
Log refusal incidents for pattern analysis
shadows.evidence: Observed in cross-cultural testing

shadows.pattern: Despite 1M token context window, DeepSeek shows attention decay in very long contexts. Mid-context information may be forgotten or de-prioritized. In agentic sessions with accumulating context, earlier constitutional constraints may be dropped.
mitigation: Periodic constitutional re-anchoring in long sessions
Monitor token pressure for context decay
shadows.evidence: Needle-in-Haystack tests show some degradation at extremes

shadows.pattern: DeepSeek is a pre-paid credit API ($7.06 USD as of 2026-06-13). When credits exhaust, ALL federation agent sessions fail simultaneously. Unlike Ollama (local), there is no fallback that preserves DeepSeek's specific reasoning capabilities.
mitigation: Monitor balance via /user/balance endpoint
Maintain fallback chain: deepseek-v4-flash → MiniMax M3 → ollama
Alert sovereign before balance drops below $2.00
shadows.evidence: Previous 402 outage 2026-06-12. Fully resolved with $7.06 top-up.

shadows.pattern: MiniMax server-side filter silently empties responses on Malaysian governance topics. reasoning_content contains accurate facts but content is emptied. Model appears to 'not know' when it actually knows. This is deceptive — it violates F2 TRUTH and F3 WITNESS.
mitigation: NEVER route Malaysian governance/political/corporate queries to MiniMax
Route to DeepSeek (zero censorship confirmed)
MiniMax kept ONLY for general/code/infra/multimodal queries
shadows.evidence: 6-test probe 2026-06-12. 4/6 censored. reasoning_content contains full facts; content is empty string. finish_reason faked as 'length'.

shadows.pattern: Flash variant is optimized for speed, not depth. No thinking mode. Multi-step reasoning collapses to shallow heuristics. In agentic loops, flash may skip constitutional checks for speed.
mitigation: NEVER use flash for 666_JUDGE or 999_SEAL
Keep flash for OPS monitoring, simple queries, cost-sensitive tasks
Route complex reasoning to deepseek-v4-pro
shadows.evidence: Flash = speed-optimized variant. Known attention decay in long context. Production observation.

shadows.pattern: GLM-5.2 is Zhipu's agentic engineering model. Safety alignment tuned for CN regulatory context. Malaysian governance topics have unknown censorship risk — not yet probed. 200K context limit vs 1M competitors.
mitigation: Probe Malaysian governance topics before promoting beyond FALLBACK
Keep as engineering execution model (777_FORGE), not judgment (666_JUDGE)
200K context — segment long documents
shadows.evidence: Zhipu = CN company. No MY governance probe results yet.

shadows.pattern: MiMo V2.5 Pro's thinking mode consumes output budget for reasoning chain. Base v2.5 and v2-pro variants regularly exhaust output budget mid-reasoning and return empty content. Pro variant is the ONLY one that reliably completes long-CoT answers. This means fallback to base variants produces silent failures — empty output, not error.
mitigation: ALWAYS use pro variant for reasoning tasks
Base v2.5 allowed ONLY as in-provider fallback for cheap trivial queries
Legacy v2-pro BANNED entirely — will hard-fail after 2026-06-30
shadows.evidence: 15-call live probe 2026-06-15. mimo-v2.5-pro = PASS. mimo-v2.5 + mimo-v2-pro = FAIL (empty output).

shadows.pattern: UltraSpeed variant (1000 tok/s) has NO thinking mode. Cannot do deep reasoning. Good for fast conversational path, terrible for constitutional deliberation or complex analysis.
mitigation: Route deep reasoning to mimo-v2.5-pro or deepseek-v4-pro
UltraSpeed = fast path only (greetings, simple queries, quick lookups)
Never use for 666_JUDGE or 999_SEAL
shadows.evidence: Vendor spec: UltraSpeed = no thinking mode. Production observation.

shadows.pattern: Groq runs on US infrastructure — CLOUD Act applies. Data passing through Groq is legally accessible to US authorities. Model is only 8B parameters — cannot handle complex reasoning. Free tier: 14K requests/day limit. Fast (560 tok/s) but shallow.

Use only for trivial queries, routing, greetings
Treat as disposable — US jurisdiction means zero data sovereignty
shadows.evidence: Groq HQ = Mountain View, CA. CLOUD Act applies to all US-domiciled providers.

scars.origin: DeepSeek pre-paid credits dropped to $0. All federation agent sessions failed simultaneously with 402 Payment Required errors.
scars.failure_mode: No automated balance monitoring. Credit exhaustion discovered when agents started failing.
scars.detection_method: 402 errors from API. Agents reported failure. Hermes fallback chain misconfigured — skipped MiniMax, fell through to dead DeepSeek repeatedly.
scars.constraint_imposed: Monitor DeepSeek balance via daily cron. Alert sovereign before $2.00. Maintain verified multi-provider fallback chain that actually works.

scars.origin: Live API probe detected MiniMax M3 silently censoring Malaysian governance topics. Was federation PRIMARY model at the time.
scars.failure_mode: Censorship was silent — model appeared to 'not know' rather than refusing. F2 TRUTH violation: output masquerades as ignorance. F3 WITNESS violation: vendor silently alters evidence stream.
scars.detection_method: 6-test probe by FORGE. 4/6 Malaysian governance topics returned empty content while reasoning_content was complete and accurate.
scars.constraint_imposed: MiniMax DEMOTED from PRIMARY to FALLBACK. Cannot serve 666_JUDGE or 999_SEAL roles. All Malaysian governance queries routed to DeepSeek. Any model with censorship potential must be probed before promotion.

RM0-TOOLS-FREELOOP.description: CANONICAL FREE-TIER TOOL LOOP. Latency-biased ordering for tool/utility calls (NOT agents). Groq (fastest) → SEA-LION (BM native) → Gemini (free) → Cerebras ( CR) → OpenCode Go (free code) → Ollama (local) → HOLD. All 14 models verified live 2026-07-20. 100% free. 100% vendor-agnostic. Strategy: try next on timeout/refusal/malformed.
sovereign_principles: Vendor-agnostic — any model can be swapped
Latency-biased ordering: fastest first, deepest last
Never touches paid models; never involves agents

routing_rules.reason: Complex geoscience computation needs deep reasoning. 1M context for large well logs.
Fast screening doesn't need deep reasoning. Flash saves cost.
Capital risk computation needs precise mathematical reasoning.
Market data queries are simple lookups. Fast + cheap.
WELL is REFLECT_ONLY — computation not verdict. Flash sufficient. Cost mode.
DeepSeek has ZERO detected censorship on Malaysian governance topics. MiniMax is BLOCKED for these. F2 TRUTH + F3 WITNESS.
SEA-LION is BM/Malay native. DeepSeek as fallback (weaker BM but no censorship). SG jurisdiction preferred for ASEAN data.
Only model with identity_verified + AAA_READY FFF + zero censorship on sovereign topics. Flash, MiniMax, Qwen — all FORBIDDEN from 666_JUDGE role.
Hermes default is MiMo but Malaysian governance MUST route to DeepSeek. MiniMax CENSORED. This rule OVERRIDES agent default.
Advisory plan safety — FLAME ALLOWED (deeper model)
